message:
feat(messaging): two-phase publish with obligation-tracked durability (8w83i.6.6)

Add reserve_publish/send two-phase publish API to Fabric:
- PublishPermit: linear #[must_use] permit with send/abort/drop semantics
- reserve_publish(): lightweight ephemeral path (no obligation)
- reserve_publish_durable(): allocates ObligationToken via ledger
- publish() becomes convenience wrapper around reserve_publish+send
- Structured tracing: publish_reserve, publish_commit, publish_abort

Add two-phase append to Stream storage:
- StreamAppendPermit with reserve_append/commit_append
- Dedup window enforcement on append and commit_append paths
- DuplicateDetected error for idempotent publish rejection

Tests: reserve+send, reserve+abort, reserve+drop, durable obligation
allocation, dedup window (within/expired/different payload), dedup with
reserve-commit path, close-boundary commit rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
